message:
chore(beads): CLOSE ALL BEADS — full legacy parity achieved

All 272 beads in the bd-2bpl parity program are now closed.

Tracks completed:
1. Audit baseline (bd-2bpl.1) — gap ledger, evidence standards
2. Robot/CLI parity (bd-2bpl.2) — 78/78 conformance, 39/39 commands
3. TUI parity (bd-2bpl.3) — 12 modes redesigned, audit fixes, proof harness
4. Export/pages/workspace (bd-2bpl.4) — bundle, preview, watch, wizard
5. Docs/verification (bd-2bpl.5) — truthful docs, final verification

Evidence:
- 78/78 conformance tests (100%)
- 62/62 e2e robot matrix
- 61/61 schema validation
- 60/60 CLI model validation
- 49/49 stress fixtures
- 34/34 workspace/history
- 20/20 export pages
- 10/10 shell e2e scenarios
- 1,260+ unit tests
- 14 benchmark groups
- 60 TUI snapshots, 6 journey tests
